summary.en: Alibaba's AI models with strong multimodal capabilities and Alibaba Cloud integration.
summary.zh: 阿里的 AI 模型，具备强大的多模态能力和阿里云集成。

title.en: Alibaba Qwen API Key - Multimodal AI on Alibaba Cloud | Get Model Key
title.zh: 阿里通义 API Key - 阿里云上的多模态 AI | Get Model Key

description.en: Get Alibaba Qwen API key for multimodal AI models. Access Qwen series on Alibaba Cloud.
description.zh: 获取阿里通义 API Key，访问多模态 AI 模型。在阿里云上使用通义系列模型。

benefit.en: Many models provide around 1M tokens of trial quota, commonly with a 90-day window (subject to official policy).
benefit.zh: 多数模型提供约 100 万 Token 体验额度，常见有效期约 90 天（以官方规则为准）。

notes.en: A broad model ecosystem, including popular options like Qwen and DeepSeek, which makes it useful as a versatile fallback pool for OpenClaw.
notes.zh: 模型池覆盖面广（含 Qwen、DeepSeek 等热门模型），适合作为 OpenClaw 的通用备用与兜底选项。
